copy.keyTakeaway: Tech stocks split on earnings vibes—NVDA crushes, TSLA stumbles. Baseball had some tight finishes. NBA Finals tip tomorrow, F1 Monaco this weekend.

todaysHits.sports: Tigers edge Rays in one-run thriller; Brewers demolish Giants.
todaysHits.markets: Tech mixed: NVDA +6.3%, TSLA -4.6%, SPY steady.
todaysHits.golf: Russell Henley leads Charles Schwab at 13-under.
todaysHits.f1: Monaco Grand Prix arrives this weekend.
todaysHits.culture: Euphoria finale sparks debate; Sweeney responds to critics.

golf.headline: Henley wins Schwab Challenge, Cole closes hard in second
golf.whyCare1: Charles Schwab Challenge kicks off the FedEx Cup playoffs, so winners here build early momentum in the race for the $25 million prize.
golf.whyCare2: Henley's one-shot victory over Cole shows the field is tight right now—no one's running away, which means any hot week matters.
golf.watchFor: Eric Cole. Second place finishes don't stick around long if you keep showing up. Watch whether he converts this into a win in the next few events.
golf.whatToSay: Henley's quietly one of the most consistent guys on tour. Cole's knocking, though—dude's close.

culture.topic: Sydney Sweeney Fires Back at Euphoria Haters
culture.whatHappened: Sydney Sweeney responded to critics of the show with a three-word statement, brushing off the noise around Euphoria's third season.
culture.whyItMatters: She's done playing defense on a show that made her famous and probably made bank—time to move on to better material.
culture.whatToSay: She's right to ignore the internet. Show's run its course anyway.

culture.whatHappened: Germany's national team cruised past Finland in a friendly match, controlling the game from start to finish.
culture.whyItMatters: It's a clean statement heading into the summer window—Germany's got their act together and Finland looked completely outmatched.
culture.whatToSay: Germany looked sharp. Finland had no answer all night.

culture.whatHappened: Ben Affleck returns as the autistic forensic accountant who's also a lethal contractor.
